Bloodstained Tunic  
 


Slot: CHEST
AC: 13
WIS: +4 AGI: +4
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Bloodstained Tunic

Slot: CHEST
AC: 13
WIS: +4 AGI: +4
WT: 6.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR CLR PAL RNG SHD BRD ROG SHM BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Chain
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):209, 87, 76
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:4 pp 9 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:90
Lucy Entry By:Kheldar
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-09-11 05:31:52
Page Updated:Sun Nov 17th, 2019

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 62pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 30
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Estate of Unrest
NPC Name
an undead knight of Unrest


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Estate of Unrest
Rare Drop. His common is the Bloodstained Mantle.


Uploaded July 27th, 2020 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
rogue pull from balcony
QuoteReply
# Jun 21 2005 at 12:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591831476003
14 posts
If you have a rogue in your group this is easy just do the same as romodar said earlier but with sneak and safe fall this will be a smooth operation. I try to group with a good tank so that when we have it under control i can leave the fight and go get more.. Chain pulling gotta love it!!!
▲ Page top
Alternate Strategy
QuoteReply
# Jan 28 2003 at 10:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759999118
16 posts
At lvl 35 I was grouped with a 31 cleric and trying to hold the balcony for xp and loot, but we kept getting overrun by all the aggro from the bar. Eventually they just wore us down on mana. So we came up with a different strategy for pulling only the balcony (i.e. undead knight and placeholders.) Cleric would wait at fountains near zone. I would invis vs undead, go up to balcony, slap the undead knight (or whatever was there in his place) and jump from balcony and run to fountains.

This pulled only the balcony mobs, and seemed to ***** up their pathing a bit so that they didn't all get to us at once. Then when tanking them, I'd fight one till I saw another inc, and I'd spook the one I was fighting and switch to the inc mob. Cleric only needed to heal when I got harm-touched or cast on by hag, and spook one if my cast got interrupted. Rotated the mobs until all were dead, es no problemo. Got the tunic on the 2nd kill of undead knight. )

A couple other points...It's always a good idea to ooc that you're pulling to zone. And we always heal and rez (for free, of course) anyone who gets hit by our trains - and anyone else in Unrest, for that matter!

Also, that jump from the balcony is a rough one. When I jumped all the way to the ground, I took 94 dmg. When I could land on the porch roof below, it was only 54 dmg. With over 1100 hp unbuffed tho, it was worth it. :-)
▲ Page top
Lucky?
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2002 at 10:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1676852283084
74 posts
This item is noted as rare. Little story of mine, involves 2 nights and 2 Knights...and now i have 2 of these tunics to overprice and sell in the Bazaar.

Compared to Acrylia Studded Tunic?
QuoteReply
# Jun 18 2002 at 2:25 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776823129
Scholar
49 posts
For clerics, would the AST be better, with 2 less AC but 4 more wis? This is probably a dumb question, but I haven't played a cleric before.

Thanks
▲ Page top
RE: Compared to Acrylia Studded Tunic?
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2002 at 4:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759392552
Scholar
627 posts
Yes, I would take the wis4 over the AST. The agi4 will pretty much even out the true ac that you would be losing.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2002 at 2:16 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591758546165
15 posts
i think this is a great tunic as a cleric into your 40's. easiesy wis item to get, and the cleric armor BP sucks.
▲ Page top
spawn time
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2001 at 2:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570679880
7 posts
anyone know the spawn time on this little undead knight? heheh
▲ Page top
RE: spawn time
QuoteReply
# May 10 2002 at 3:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768453809
4 posts
The spawn time of the knight and his place-holders is twenty minutes, I believe.

Edited, Fri May 10 04:32:56 2002
▲ Page top
RE: spawn time
QuoteReply
# Dec 19 2001 at 11:51 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592250348001
Scholar
153 posts
At the back of the house, all the way up the stairs there's a room with three spawns. Ussually this consists of hags. Clean out the room a few times and the knight will spawn. However, I should point out that the undead noble and barkeep a floor below might be placeholders for it. I really don't know because the fact is, if you fight anything on those two floors, it will agro the others.

I went in there once and the knight was up. There were two barbed bone skellys with it and I decided to root them and take down the knight. I rooted one but before I even got around to rooting the second one, the entire bar room came upstairs and joined the fight.

The knight was blue to me around 28 or so and taking him down was cake (I caused a train and then rooted him before I zoned out). Hags, imo are tougher. But forget solo'ing him for the most part because the adds and pathing in unrest are unbelievably bad. Subsequent attempts to create a train and then root the knight on my way out proved to be exercises in frustration.
▲ Page top
RE: spawn time
QuoteReply
# Dec 02 2002 at 5:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1694996185141
Scholar
137 posts
The Knight is the center spawn on the top floor. Whatever stands there is his placeholder.
▲ Page top
Rare
QuoteReply
# Oct 04 2001 at 1:25 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248766762
Scholar
81 posts
Finally got one of these off that silly undead knight in unrest. I'd say you have about a 1 in 10 chance of looting one. I think from my personal experience i got 8 or so mantles and one of these. Good luck, its a nice cleric item.
P.S. watch out for the knight's harm touch, i think it hits for somewhere in the 200's
▲ Page top
This is great.
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2001 at 10:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251199572
9 posts
I am a cleric on Tarew Marr and was lucky enough to get this beauty at lvl 9 or so. Healed a guy in crush without him asking or anything and turned out he had a high lvl alt with one in the bank. He ran and got it for me, but now i am lvl 25 and still have this on, figure i will keep it until i can get the quest plate. But if you get the chance to get this I would, to either sell or ware.
